title: francoaceae
intro: The Francoaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of herbs and shrubs that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Francoaceae includes about 70 species, primarily found in Africa and Australia. This family is characterized by its distinctive flowers and fruits, often featuring showy petals and berry-like structures. Francoaceae plants are known for their unique growth habits and adaptations to various environments, making them a diverse and interesting group of plants.
